jd_text:
Our client is a premium lifestyle quick‑commerce platform entering the Saudi market. They are seeking a Commercial Director to own the commercial strategy and lead the end‑to‑end commercial performance across all categories in KSA.
This role is responsible for maximizing revenue, margin, supplier value, and category growth while shaping the product assortment and building strong supplier partnerships. It requires a commanding commercial leader with deep supplier negotiation experience and the ability to drive high‑impact commercial outcomes.
Key Responsibilities
Own and drive commercial performance, P&L, revenue, and margin KPIsBuild category strategies across grocery, beauty, home, gifting, and curated premium linesLead supplier acquisition, negotiations, and trading terms to secure top‑tier discounts, promos, and rebatesDevelop pricing architecture, promo calendars, and margin‑protection strategiesOversee forecasting, demand planning, and replenishment alignmentPartner with Marketing on 360° brand activation and co‑marketing budgetsLead new category launches, exclusive lines, gifting concepts, and private‑label initiativesManage and mentor the commercial team across category management, buying, planning, and analyticsCollaborate cross‑functionally with Operations, Supply Chain, Finance, Marketing, and TechBuild strong commercial governance, vendor scorecards, and negotiation playbooks
Requirements Experience in FMCG, retail, e‑commerce, or quick‑commerce commercial leadershipProven ability to secure aggressive supplier terms, rebates, exclusives, and promo fundingStrong commercial instincts with exceptional negotiation and influencing capabilityDeep experience in pricing, promotions, category profitability, and inventory implicationsStrong analytical, data‑driven commercial decision‑makingLeadership experience managing cross‑functional commercial teamsBachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business, Commerce, or related fieldFluent in English; Arabic is an advantage
** Due to the high volume of applications, please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. If you do not hear from us within two weeks, kindly consider your application unsuccessful at this time. Thank you for your understanding. **
